item.title: Year 8
item.description: I upload this chicken bone on July 29th since 2016. It's looking a bit rough after eight years
item.dc:creator: MaxximumB

item.title: We openned a retail store!
item.description:
Hey imgur! Kristen and I opened a retail store this summer! I've posted about our company Cognitive Surplus before. We make science themed gifts, and this summer we got the chance to open a retail shop.
We've been thinking about a retail space for a little while now, and when a space opened up in our little town of Redmond Oregon we jumped on it.
The first step was a fresh coat of paint!
Then we built a lot of shelves.... so many shelves
Since our shop is going to celebrate all things science, I wanted to create some museum like exhibits inside the shop. One idea I had was to create these cool terrariums that used scientific glassware to humidify the plants.
Kristen and I drove up to Mt Hood and harvested some mosses, lichen and a few saplings.
The terrariums turned out way better than I expected. I ended up building the "tree stump" inside the vessel by glueing bark together around a branch I cut.
The humidifier system works great. There is a small atomizer sitting on a tripod that I designed and 3D printed. A small fishtank air pump pressurizes the chamber and forces the mist out and up the tubes where it can ooze out into the tank.
Its starting to come together! We have most of the shelves built and we're starting to decorate!
Another idea I had for an exhibit was a shadow wall. For this one I hired a freelancer to help wire and code the electronic components. The green background is made of a photosensitive material that when it is energied, glows. Except where your body blocks the light.
I put up our logo on the front and we opened! We are only soft open right now, because we have a few more changes that are coming (new shelves that haven't arrived etc) but here are some photos of the shop, I hope you like it!
This is our tester table so you can try our pens and notebooks.
The terrarium ended up right in the window. To make the terrarium more self sustaining I added some isopods and other critters to eat the decaying materials. This is a link to a video of the isopods https://www.tiktok.com/@cognitivesurplus/video/7396110302305127722?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc&web_id=7397157548941739562
There are some awkward hallways that i turned into a gallery wall. We might try and put some other interactive exhibit in this space, but for now its a place to celebrate Sir Issac and to tell our story.
Thanks for taking a look, and if you're ever in Redmond Oregon stop by and say hi! (dog tax, Moop wondering when the f we're going home)
item.dc:creator: RoninTactican

item.title: 100% true and 100% awesome, 200% AC/DC
item.description: I will never not upvote this. I used to be disdainful of AC/DC till I saw an interview with them where they said they wanted to be the best party band, and then it changed how I viewed them. I love em now. Party on, Wayne! Party on, Garth!

item.title: Almost 2,000 years in age,the Roman aqueduct located in Zaghouan, Tunisia, stands as a remarkable example of ancient engineering. Spanning 132 kilometers (82 miles), this aqueduct historically supplied water to Carthage

item.title: No disputing that…
item.description: Disputing means to disagree with. Disagree means to not agree with. Please stop putting crayons in the fire alarm.
item.dc:creator: malbec

item.title: I think I found my wedding dress!
item.description: This dress is so different than anything I thought I’d want. I’d always pictured myself wearing a black gown, so when I tried this on it was such a shock (in a good way). I felt like a pretty Victorian ghost and I loved it so much. I’m gonna go back in a few weeks with my aunt to show her and officially say yes!
item.dc:creator: bunniebby

item.title: Nice!
item.dc:creator: Raider2187

item.title: Melted his heart
item.description: Per the groom, Dennis: “Since she first met me she’s been calling me “DENIMS”, I couldn’t for the life of me understand where she got it from but after courting her mom for a few months, I found out its the dad on a cartoon she watches(I believe its called Bluey). I told her during this dance that I was the most blessed bonus dad in the world and she quickly corrected me saying “Technically you’re my dad now, because you married my mom.” Y’all I was through, I held it together watching my beautiful bride coming down the isle but this little princess cooked me because I was done ❤️. This may not mean anything to y’all but as the father of 4 boys and now a bonus son and daughter, this was epic
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice
